channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Inflection AI shifts to Intel Gaudi 3, challenging Nvidia’s AI chip lead
item.description: Inflection AI is shifting its latest enterprise platform to Intel’s Gaudi 3 accelerators, stepping away from Nvidia GPUs.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Facebook, YouTube and TikTok users in Europe get forum to challenge social media content decisions
item.description: Social media users across the European Union will soon have a new forum to challenge decisions by platforms to remove posts and videos for breaking their rules or leave up others that may violate them.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Control the path and power of hurricanes like Milton? Forget it, scientists say
item.description: In the wake of hurricanes that have disrupted lives for millions in the U.S., some people may wonder if extreme weather events could be somehow controlled.
item.dc:creator: Melina Walling And Seth Borenstein, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump says migrants who have committed murder have introduced 'a lot of bad genes in our country'
item.description: Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump on Monday suggested that migrants who are in the U_S_ and have committed murder did so because “it’s in their genes.”.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Deloitte takes fire from Trump-Vance allies over leaked employee messages
item.description: Deloitte has come under fire from close allies of former President Trump and Sen. JD Vance (R-Ohio) after one of its employees shared private conversations with Vance from 2020 in which the vice presidential candidate criticized Trump. Donald Trump Jr.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg passes Jeff Bezos to become world’s second-richest person
item.description: Zuckerberg’s bet on the metaverse — which initially looked like a huge bust — has paid off in recent months, pushing his net worth to a high-water mark of $206.2 billion.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: X's Appeal Denied: Supreme Court Declines to Hear Case Over Search Warrant
item.description: Supreme Court denies X's appeal over search warrant in election-interference case against Donald Trump
item.dc:creator: Lindsay Whitehurst, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bay Area poll: Silicon Valley is too powerful, has lost its moral compass, majority say
item.description: Interviews with poll respondents reveal nuanced views and deep disenchantment with Silicon Valley tech.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: Why evolving cyber threats mean small businesses are ransomware targets
item.description: Dark Matter’s powerful fictional short film based on real events, Butterfly, goes inside the experience of a small business as its world is turned upside down by ransomware.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Advocacy groups suspend use of 'suicide capsule' pending Swiss criminal probe of woman's death
item.description: Advocacy groups behind a so-called suicide capsule said Sunday they have suspended the process of taking applications to use it — which numbered over 370 last month — as a criminal investigation into its first use in Switzerland is completed.
item.dc:creator: JAMEY KEATEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: How rockets could travel to Mars in half the time with nuclear thermal propulsion
item.description: NASA plans to send crewed missions to Mars over the next decade – but the 140 million-mile (225 million-kilometer) journey to the red planet could take several months to years round trip. This relatively long transit time is a result of the use of traditional chemical rocket fuel.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: Cyber Leaders Exchange: Army, SSA and USCIS cyber chiefs on securing software through automation
item.description: Cybersecurity experts from the Army Software Factory, SSA and USCIS say letting developers drive security efforts drives up safety in code. The post Cyber Leaders Exchange: Army, SSA and USCIS cyber chiefs on securing software through automation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: OMB gives agencies new considerations when buying AI
item.description: The Office of Management and Budget told agencies in a new memo to proactively manage AI risks, promote a competitive market and manage business processes. The post OMB gives agencies new considerations when buying AI first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: OSINT unveiled: The technology behind the intelligence
item.description: How is the Army leveraging OSINT to strengthen its intelligence capabilities? The post OSINT unveiled: The technology behind the intelligence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Spring AI: An AI framework for Java developers
item.description: Artificial intelligence has been something of a fiesta for programmers for the last few years, and one language—Python—has been the undeniable belle of the ball. Java and other languages have been a bit sidelined.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Details from New Mexico's lawsuit against Snap show site failed to act on reports of sextortion
item.description: Snapchat failed to act on “rampant” reports of child grooming, sextortion and other dangers to minors on its platform, according to a newly unredacted complaint against the company filed by New Mexico's attorney general. Attorney General Raúl Torrez filed the original complaint on Sept.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: IBM expands Nvidia GPU options for cloud customers
item.description: IBM is offering expanded access to Nvidia GPUs on IBM Cloud to help enterprise customers advance their AI implementations, including large language model (LLM) training.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New Jersey offshore wind farm clears big federal hurdle amid environmental concerns
item.description: SEA GIRT, N.J. (AP) — The federal government gave a key approval Tuesday to an offshore wind farm in New Jersey, even as residents in the town where its power cable would come ashore worry it could go through underground toxic waste that's still being cleaned up. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: WAYNE PARRY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Scammers’ sneaky new tactic preying on people who’ve lost their iPhone
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how to protect yourself with eight steps if your iPhone is lost or stolen.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
